primary_isic_title: Other activities auxiliary to financial services, except insurance and pension funding
rationale: Third-party funds movement, remittance/payment exposure, currency exchange exposure and cross-border transaction flows.
when_to_use: Use 6619 for payment providers, electronic funds transfer, P2P payment/settlement and similar services. Use 6612 for bureaux de change / currency exchange. Use 6419 only where activity is closer to monetary intermediation or money order/deposit-taking related activity.
controls: Verify license/regulatory status; assess AML controls; confirm corridors/countries, expected volumes, third-party payments, cash exposure and agent network; enhanced monitoring.

primary_isic_title: Wholesale of metals and metal ores
rationale: Portable high-value commodities, gold/precious-metal typologies, cash exposure, smuggling and sanctions/PF exposure.
when_to_use: Use 4672 for wholesale metals including gold/precious metals. Use 4773 for retail jewellery/watches/clocks. Use 3211 for manufacturing jewellery and related articles. Use 4649 where wholesale of jewellery/watches is more appropriate.
controls: Verify trade license; provenance/supplier due diligence; import/export documentation; cash controls; sanctions/PF screening; adverse media; ongoing monitoring.

rationale: Cash-intensive and high-velocity funds movement; established global AML typology for gambling, betting and gaming.
when_to_use: Use 9200 for casinos, floating casinos, gambling machines, lotteries, betting and online gambling/betting.
controls: Verify gaming license; source of funds/wealth; senior management approval where policy requires; cash monitoring; suspicious activity scenarios; enhanced periodic review.

primary_isic_title: Retail sale in non-specialized stores with food, beverages or tobacco predominating
cdd_edd: Standard CDD; Targeted EDD if cash-intensive or tobacco/fuel-linked
rationale: Generally retail/customer-facing activity; risk increases with cash intensity, tobacco/fuel exposure, high volume, unexplained deposits or adverse media.
when_to_use: Use 4711 where food/beverages/tobacco predominate. Use 4719 where mixed goods do not predominantly involve food/beverages/tobacco. Use 4730 where activity is mainly fuel station with convenience items.
controls: Verify trade license and outlet footprint; capture expected cash/card split; monitor cash deposits against expected profile; review tobacco/fuel exposure and high-risk suppliers/countries.

rationale: High-value movable assets, potential cash/third-party payments, trade-based risk and cross-border resale/export exposure.
when_to_use: Use 4781 for new/used motor vehicle retail dealers. Use 4661 for wholesale motor vehicles. Use 4790 for agents or online/platform intermediaries that arrange vehicle sales without taking ownership.
controls: Verify dealer license; source of funds for high-value purchases; check third-party payments; export/resale documentation; adverse media; sanctions and high-risk country screening.

rationale: Virtual asset exposure, anonymity/pseudonymity, rapid cross-border value transfer, sanctions/evasion and cybercrime typologies.
when_to_use: No single ISIC class covers all crypto. Use 6611 for crypto-asset exchanges/markets; 6612 for brokerage/trading on behalf of others; 6619 for wallets/tokenization/ICO-STO support/payment-provider-like services; 6499 for issuing/trading crypto assets with corresponding liability on own account; 6310 or 8299 where activity is non-financial data/platform/intermediation in nature.
controls: Verify VASP/crypto license or registration; assess blockchain analytics controls; sanctions screening; source of funds/wealth; wallet exposure; product/token type; travel rule controls; enhanced monitoring.
